title: The data black hole at the center of AI
summary: Dwarkesh Patel argues that massive training data volumes are a hidden but fundamental driver of AI progress, using the metaphor of a data black hole at the center of AI capabilities. The essay compares human and AI sample efficiency and explores whether sample efficiency improvements actually matter for advancing the field.
